description: Product description Brut Deodorant Spray Original 6Pk 200Mlbeauty Categories Bath Body Deodorants Anti Perspirants Deodorant Health Personal Care Directions Clean and dry underarm area before applying. Apply a thin, even layer of deodorant to the underarm area. Allow the deodorant to dry completely before putting on clothes. Reapply as needed during the day or after physical activity for continued protection.
